productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Anm Casual Brown Shoe
description: Take casual dressing to the next level with these leather shoes from red tape. Stylish to the hilt and an absolute comfort to the feet, it's a perfect addition to your wardrobe. Team this with jeans or cargo pants and shorts and stylish polo neck shirts for that cool look.Upper Full grain leather upper for maximum durability, comfort, breathability and style Leather toe cap and heel cup for enhanced protection to the forefoot and back foot Elastic inserts on the sides of the tongue to offer a customised Fit Rounded and padded collar with a leather outer and fabric inner for in-step comfort Leather tongue with a soft fabric inner lining for maximum comfort, style and breathability Contrast stitch detailing for enhanced durability and style Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Complete fabric inner lining for maximum breathability Padded fabric footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole vertically textured to offer maximum grip on smooth surfaces PU lining in the form of an '8' stitched to the midsole, acting as the toe and heel foxing and running along the midfoot for enhanced support shoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlighta
